message:
test(core): add property-based tests for fault-domain isolation

13 proptests covering FaultDomain/DomainHealth/CrashOnlyContract/
FaultEvent serde, fault recording incrementing totals, fault making
domains unhealthy, healthy+unhealthy count sum invariant, auto-isolation
threshold, restart success resetting failures, reset clearing all state,
plus degradation/snapshot serde and to_invariant_domain determinism.
(ft-2p9cb.6.1.3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
